title: Sem's Immersive Wither Storm
description: A heavily optimized and immersive take on Cracker's Wither Storm Mod!
body:
Sem's Immersive Wither Storm uses Lithosphere, William Wyther's world generation, and various immersion mods to create a seamless world.

Upon world creation, a 10 minute countdown will start before the Wither Storm is automatically spawned in.

Use nearby roads as they will lead you to villages with decent loot.
